dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.platform_admin_body: You have access to cross-tenant operations.

fields.org_slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes, 2 to 64 characters.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: Sign-in failed. Please try again shortly.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Get your concierge running in seconds.

errors.generic: Could not create the account. Please check your inputs.
errors.conflict: This email or organization slug is already taken.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

setup.title: Enable two-factor authentication
setup.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Bitwarden…).
setup.secret_hint: If you cannot scan, enter this secret in your authenticator app:
setup.already_enrolled: Two-factor authentication is already enabled on this account.
instructions: Add a new account and scan the QR code (or enter the secret).
Enter the 6-digit code displayed by the app.

challenge.title: Two-step verification
challenge.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code displayed by your authenticator app.
challenge.recovery_hint: Lost your device? Use one of your recovery codes (format XXXX-XXXX).

recovery_codes.title: Recovery codes
recovery_codes.intro: Keep these codes in a safe place. Each code works only once and replaces your authenticator if you lose access.
recovery_codes.warning: They will not be shown again.

disable.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disable.warning: Your account will be less protected. You will need to scan a new QR code to re-enable it later.

errors.invalid_code: Invalid code. Check your device clock and try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
